items.title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
items.dek: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.
items.body: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
items.dek: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.
items.body: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.
items.author: IriLine Desk
